text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's Narita! Narita is in the lead! Narita Brian has
crossed the finish line!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Cheers and cries of joy shake the venue. Even
though it's only the first race of the Classic Triple
Crown, there's an unprecedented sense of
excitement in the air.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
...What an amazing runner! I can't believe she's
our competition this year!

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
She made the other racers look like amateurs.
She's just on a whole other level...

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text:
There's no doubt about it... She's going to be the
Triple Crown Champion!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I'm going ahead. I'll be in the waiting room.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Okay.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Please wait! Narita Brian! At least a few words,
please!

text_block_list.name: Photographer
text_block_list.text: W-wait just a moment! One shot! Just one shot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Heh.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I handle the press at the entrance to avoid
causing a commotion in the runners' tunnel.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I should hurry up and head to Narita Brian. She
probably wants to discuss our upcoming schedule
as well.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, did you see that one racer? She was a total
beast on that final stretch.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
You mean Brian, right? I wonder if she'll be at the
Derby too. I just messaged my trainer that we
need to talk about it.

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Narita Brian...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, today's race made quite an
impact—not only on the spectators and reporters,
but on everyone present.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Took you long enough.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Tch... I didn't want you to apologize.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Derby is going to be here before
we know it, so let's hurry up and talk.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Will I be competing against the same runners as
today's Satsuki Sho?
choice_data_list: You want to race against them again?
You want to race against them again?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hah, what are you even saying?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Of course! No matter what others may say, not a
single person looked down during that race.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
The exhilaration of that race can only be
understood by those who were on the turf. This is
the Classic Triple Crown—the competition of my
generation.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I take back what I said before the race. I'm going
to enjoy this year to the fullest!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In this moment, Narita Brian seems to possess a
passion altogether apart from those around her.
